title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Cholamandalam Finance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cholamandalam Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Risk Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
